answer:
Gumroad does not have tiered pricing or a dedicated free tier; it uses a flat 10 percent platform fee plus 0.50 dollars per direct sale, with no monthly subscription cost [1][2]. Free products incur no fees [3][4]. 

Developer API access is self-serve and available to all accounts [5]. You can generate credentials by navigating to Advanced Settings in your Gumroad dashboard to create an application or generate a personal access token for your own account [5]. The API is RESTful, and documentation is located at app.gumroad.com/api [6][3].
